commands_run.output: Full file read — confirms pre-tool-interceptor.sh limit=500 hook is non-functional (updatedInput format invalid)

commands_run.reason: pytest not on PATH in this environment; validator self-test via direct Python invocation confirmed PASS

criteria_verified.claim: PreToolUse interceptor denies root rm patterns

criteria_verified.evidence: PROGRESS.md (633 lines) read fully in session — hook output format hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput is not a valid input-mutation mechanism; hook silently does nothing for Read limit enforcement
validator returns exit 0; ALLOWED_SETTINGS_TOP_LEVEL_KEYS and ALLOWED_SKILL_FIELDS updated
PR body contains no Closes #N reference; violates project policy

critical.title: Read-limit hook is architecturally unsound and non-functional
critical.detail: hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput is not a valid input-mutation key for Claude Code PreToolUse hooks. Empirically confirmed: PROGRESS.md (633 lines) reads fully without truncation. Hook runs on every Bash|Write|Edit|Read call, adding latency, while achieving nothing.

critical.title: awsAuthRefresh command is out-of-scope for DegenExus
critical.detail: DegenExus has zero AWS dependencies. aws sso login --profile enterprise-devsecops has no legitimate purpose in this project. Validator was extended to permanently whitelist this field.

important.title: Wrong agent name: security-reviewer should be security-auditor
important.detail: Per .claude/rules/02-agent-synergy.md, the correct agent is security-auditor. security-reviewer does not exist in the registry.

important.title: No Closes #N reference
important.detail: CLAUDE.md policy and project history require all PRs to link GitHub issues. This PR references an external Codex task only.

important.title: sandbox.network.allowedDomains omits api.anthropic.com
important.detail: If sandbox is enforced, LLM calls would be blocked. Likely a no-op field but incomplete if ever activated.

suggestions.title: .worktreeinclude is not a recognized git or Claude Code concept
docs-memory-curator routing gate bypassed
suggestions.detail: Per 02-agent-synergy.md, .claude/** changes require docs-memory-curator review with config_validation/hook_compile/stale_reference_scan/memory_impact evidence.

verdict_rationale: Post-merge retrospective COMMENT. Would have been REQUEST_CHANGES if reviewed before merge. Three blocking findings: F1 (non-functional hook adding latency), F2 (out-of-scope AWS command whitelisted in validator), F3 (wrong agent name causes runtime throw).
risks: pre-tool-interceptor.sh adds overhead to every tool invocation with zero security benefit
awsAuthRefresh permanently whitelisted in validator — future AWS additions will not trigger warnings
audit-orchestrator.js unusable at runtime due to wrong agent name
